name: Admin Audit Trail
description: Logs general CUD events performed by the user (using the forms) on the website.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_auth
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs user authentication events (login, logout, request password).

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_block_content
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs custom block content create/update/delete events.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_config
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs configuration changes via a config CRUD event subscriber (not form-based).

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_menu
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs menu and menu-link create/update/delete events, including translations.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_node
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs node (content) create/update/delete and translation events.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_redirect
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs redirect entity create/update/delete events, including i18n.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_taxonomy
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs taxonomy vocabulary and term create/update/delete events.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_user_roles
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs user role assignment and removal events.

submodules_detail.name: admin_audit_trail_workflows
submodules_detail.purpose: Logs Content Moderation / Workflows state and transition events.
